titulo_original: サキュバス&ヒットマン
synopsis:
High schooler Gamou Shouya is a dead man—sort of. The real Shouya Gamou is long gone, but his body lives on, inhabited by the soul of a boy who made a pact with the succubus Armelina. In exchange for his services as her personal hitman, Armelina is helping him hunt down the people who brutally murdered him and his family. The path ahead is dark and deadly, but Shouya's got nothing left to lose...not even his soul.

(Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)
background: Succubus & Hitman has been published in English as Succubus and Hitman by Seven Seas Entertainment since January 18, 2022.
